text.title: Communications Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (stakeholder_count, external_client, timezone_gap, contract_sla) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

branch.question: External client / regulator in stakeholder set?

conclusion.verdict: apply full comms plan with SLA-backed escalations
apply internal-only comms plan with fixed status cadence
lightweight verbal coordination; defer formal plan until scale grows

text.example: stakeholder_count=8 → external_client=true → apply full comms plan (rule matrix-per-stakeholder).
